name: LED Flashlight: Color & Strobe
description: A bright LED flashlight with color modes, strobe light, shake activation, SOS mode, and screen torch controls.
shortDesc: LED flashlight with color & strobe modes

name: Video Downloader No Watermark
description: Download videos in HD without watermarks, track progress live, and save reels, shorts, stories, tweets, and status videos offline.

name: PDF Converter - Word to PDF
description: Convert photos, images, scans, and documents into editable or sharable PDFs with a simple all-in-one PDF toolkit.

name: BMI Calculator
description: A fast and easy BMI calculator with history tracking, clean results, and a simple modern interface.

name: QR Code Scanner
description: Scan and create QR codes and barcodes with instant recognition, batch scanning, offline support, and dark mode.
shortDesc: QR & barcode scanner with offline support
